name: Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out pastry to fit an 8 inch pie plate.
2. Flute the edges and bake "blind," meaning without a filling. To preserve the shape of the pie, fit a circle of greaseproof paper into the pastry-lined dish and fill with dried beans. Remove the paper and beans for the last 5 minutes of baking time (approximately 25 minutes total).
3. Meanwhile, make the cream filling.
4. Mix sugar, cornflour, and salt together in a saucepan.
5. Add milk gradually, stirring until the mixture comes to a boil and boils for one minute longer.
6. Stir half of the boiling mixture into the slightly beaten egg yolks. Return to the pan and boil for 1 minute.
7. Remove from heat, then blend in butter and vanilla essence. Allow to cool.
8. Slice bananas and arrange them on the cooled pastry shell.
9. Cover with cream filling.
10. Before serving, whip double cream and pipe or spoon around the edge of the pie.
